message:
feat(connectors): expand Matrix with sync/media/state ops and harden Azure/Teams

Matrix: add sync, get_room_state, list_members, upload_media, and
download_media operations. Add credential-ID header support, redact
access_token in Debug, base64 dependency for media upload, sync token
persistence via RwLock, and comprehensive manifest declarations.

Azure: rustfmt assertion formatting in types tests.

Teams: expand connector with additional operation dispatch and
structured error handling.

Supabase: add standardized protocol loop with should_skip_protocol_line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
